children.heading: .—Establishment of Incentive Program
children.label: a .—Establishment of Incentive Program
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall plan and establish an incentive program in accordance with this section for contractors to purchase capital assets manufactured in the United States in part with funds available to the Department of Defense.

children.heading: .—Defense Industrial Capabilities Fund May Be Used
children.label: b .—Defense Industrial Capabilities Fund May Be Used
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may use the Defense Industrial Capabilities Fund, established under section 814 of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2004, for incentive payments under the program established under this section.

children.heading: .—Applicability to Major Defense Acquisition Program Contracts
children.label: c .—Applicability to Major Defense Acquisition Program Contracts
children.text: The incentive program shall apply to contracts for the procurement of a major defense acquisition program.

children.heading: .—Consideration
children.label: d .—Consideration
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall provide consideration in source selection in any request for proposals for a major defense acquisition program for offerors with eligible capital assets.
